I love this game. I played it every single day. The servers were shut down because they lost all over their data. They could just make a new project and it could be even better. They could use the stuff that they remember from the old game and make a comeback. It’s really sad to see this game gone.

reviews.review_description: This was the most fun game to play with my buddys. It was great.  jumping over Stuff and going in slow motion. And now its a corpse of what it was onky being stuck on the menu. I  mis the game. Please bring it back

Me and my friend used to play this game all the time and even grind it out we both got the galaxy shirts every time it updated we played it now that it’s gone we don’t know what to play so PLZ BRING IT BACK THE GAME IS PEAK
I started vr back in summer 2023. This was the game that got me into horror games, every time i see this game pop up, it gives me some slight nostalgia.
This game was so good and I miss it so much please bring it back!

I understand and know the pain of having lost all of the data, but this was my favourite game to play every day, I bought everything, such as a cool laser ray gun from the cosmetics shop, the size enlarger, and the grenades in pvp. This game was great, I even sit in the monkey labs loading screen just so I can remember how good of a game it was, I would be really happy if you brought it back with only 1 level of horror, and progress up to level 2,3,4 etc. please, we want this game back we loved it, the community was great, please, even if it was for only a lobby I'd play it everyday for hours again.

reviews.review_title: They need to bring this game back
reviews.review_description: To the owner of monkey labs please bring this game back. It was such a good game. I had so much fun and it was definitely one of my top played games until the day I logged on it continuously kicked me. There were also thousands of things to do in that game horror was a 1000 out of 10 just because it was so fun and it was a very good one. PVP was also very good just because of the guns and there were so many things you could do. It was a bit glitchy but other than that only up was also very good too kind of hard though lol And the monkey model I absolutely loved🤣 And I do understand if you don’t have the time to bring it back

reviews.review_title: High quality game with a good community.
reviews.review_description: With my time on this game, i can really say this is one of my quest games that i really enjoy. the pvp, the horror. everything about this game is so clean. And the developer of this game isnt some money-grubbing kid who dosent care about his community. the moderation team awesome, and every player does their best  to keep this game a gem.
